data.body: Augustine was not a shrinking violet. He had a bit of a wild youth, and fathered a child out of wedlock. He also wasn't above crude language when he needed it to make a point. You'll see that in some later Augustinians, too. (cont)
data.author: did:plc:xb43bf5ocdhn7wxecocqgsqc

data.body: All this is to say that Augustine's influence is all over the modern Catholic Church, and deeply ingrained in this Augustinian Pope. Leo will not hesitate to speak truth to power, and to do so from a position of theological knowledge. (cont)
